headline: Insiders Favor Cardinal Infrastructure Group And 2 Other Prominent Growth Stocks
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has remained flat, but it has shown a substantial rise of 28% over the past 12 months with earnings forecasted to grow by 16% annually. In this context, growth companies with high insider ownership such as Cardinal Infrastructure Group can be particularly appealing as they often indicate confidence from those closest to the company in its future performance.

headline: Teradyne and Qualcomm have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Teradyne and Qualcomm take center stage as AI-driven growth powers TER's surge, while QCOM faces pressure from declining handset sales.

headline: High Insider Ownership Growth Stocks To Consider In May 2026
summary: In the last week, the United States market has stayed flat, but it is up 28% over the past year with earnings forecasted to grow by 16% annually. headline: Earnings Volatility Watch: 7 AI-Linked Stocks Are Set For Double-Digit Moves This Week
summary: Seven AI-linked names with combined market caps of $830 billion report this week — and options markets are pricing every single one for a double-digit move. (157 chars — slight trim needed)
